title: bupleurum praealtum
intro: Bupleurum praealtum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or Chinese bocking grass, is a plant species in the genus Bupleurum, a group of flowering plants in the carrot family. The medicinal properties of Bupleurum praealtum are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and immune-modulating effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Bupleurum praealtum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and alleviating symptoms of depression and anxiety. Bupleurum praealtum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, teas, and capsules, which are often combined with other medicinal herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
